title: DARK SOULS™ III

notes: Current version of Proton doesn't let other resolutions than 1080p to be saved as full screen (need to change option to 1440p every time I restart) - should be fixed in new version. Everything else runs perfect.
title: DARK SOULS™ III

notes: Game works well only on the first area that you load. If you die or use the bonfire to transport to another area the fps drops a lot. Close the game and open again and the it runs smooth again, but only in the first area and only if you don't die. It is not a cache problem because even if you go back to a visited area after the low fps remains. My GPU only has 2GB of vram, perhaps this is not enough for this game?
title: DARK SOULS™ III

notes: Using lowest graphics settings and 720p. Generally runs flawlessly. Performance sometimes degrades after respawn - teleporting away fixes the issue, but it returns when teleporting back. Performance sometimes degrades gradually over time. Restarting the game solves performance issues.

title: DARK SOULS™ III

notes: Update from borked review using nouveau driver.  I have manually updated to 415.13  nvidia driver for my 1080 card.  Now runs perfectly. I have played several hours including being summoned and summoning others, also being invaded all works just fine.  Note, I tried updating to the ubuntu recommended 390 driver and could not load display driver, I had to reinstall OS to remedy.  I took the chance (I am not an expert!) and manually installed the latest driver and now,  Most Excellent Dude!  I can now play one of my favorite games!
title: DARK SOULS™ III

notes: Game used to work at platinum level. I played dozens of hours without many issues. Now with recent versions of proton, I am getting frequent freezes and crashes. Also major audio glitching in every boss battle.

notes: Runs perfectly with no tweaks. Does not allow for Fullscreen + 1440p resolution, but Windowed + 1440p resolutions works perfectly. All audio works as expected, and no texture or logic issues.
